name: Oatmeal Chip Cookies
recipeInstructions:
A combination of two favorite cookies: oatmeal and chocolate chip.
Preheat oven to 375°F.
In a large bowl, with mixer on medium speed, beat all ingredients except
walnuts and chips until well mixed, occasionally scraping the bowl. Stir in
the walnuts and chocolate chips.
Drop by teaspoonfuls, about 1-inch apart, onto greased cookie sheets. Bake at
375°F for 12 minutes or until lightly browned. Remove cookies to wire racks
and let cool.
Yield: 3 dozen.
